So far I've watched at least a dozen theories on YouTube that all claim to be "The one". There's even a guy who has devoted a whole YouTube channel documenting all the countless bullshit final theory claims out there.

author: @marktichenor11
text: Well said! You might want to look into the safire project, which emerged from the electric universe paradigm. They have gotten low energy elemental transmutations and are working to commercialize devices to remediate radioactive elements in fracking waste water. Quite fascinating.

replies.author: @kensmith5694

They were funded to the tune of $2,200,000 and have shown no public results.   Trace anything and you find your self back where you started in a small group of what really are con artists.

author: @andrewharpin6749
text:
My primary issue isn't which theory is correct, but the attitude some "scientists" take that a particular theory is correct, either they created it and as such have a vested interest in being remembered for it, or because that is what they were indoctrinated into and feel they will be observed as stupid in some way.

This is more belief than science.

Probably the most prominent of these currently being Big Bang Theory, Inflation Theory and Dark Matter, now I am not saying any of these are incorrect.

But there has been evidence for some time that these theories may not be entirely correct.

What we then see is supposed explanations that cover these edge and corner cases in these theories, where these may be indicators that either these theories need to be revised or an alternate solution is needed (whatever that may be).

author: @beowulfshaeffer8444
text:
Not every Electric Universe proponent supports the electric sun or electric gravity (mainly because it's really not a unified theory yet, so much as a complaint that physicists ignore electromagnetics in too many situations, especially those that are cosmological). Suspicious0bservers and Sky Scholar probably have the most level-headed discussions about the subject, and both support *the Liquid Sun* (which is also the title of a good book explaining that solar model).
Neither seems particularly impressed with Relativity or the Big Bang, but that was also apparently true of Edwin Hubble and Tullio Levi-Civita, so take that as you will. Anyway, here's some video links if anyone's interested: 
https://youtu.be/9INI2T6Nz-o?si=9tYZI-LY23nmxYvS
https://youtu.be/0CSL702JSdY?si=r73jJPig5bov032w
https://youtu.be/p8lKQMEYYLw?si=D-UH1b2jCiyidV3i
https://youtu.be/E4pWZGBpWP0?si=zuQ2koOlEXa4WUnY

replies.author: @AncientAdvancedCiv
replies.text: "mainly because it's really not a unified theory yet" - maybe they could pump out a unified theory if they filled in some blanks with 'dark variables'.

author: @orpheuscreativeco9236
text:
Well said Rob. 👍 I'm no physicist but I do enjoy learning about some of the more intriguing aspects of the subject. My mind seems to be drawn to Electric Universe theory because it ties so many things together for me, namely, the phenomenon of quantum entanglement. 🤔 

[Rambling on...]
I was on this kick for a while pondering the universe and it's interconnectivity. Years later NASA released the image of Laniakea Supercluster and it was breathtaking, I couldn't believe how much it matched my concepts and how much it looked like a synapse (as neuroscience portrays them). This gave way to many other ponderings, but mainly the simple concept as above, so below. On a super macro scale, I wonder if the motifs of life/intelligence/consciousness aren't tessalated over and over in an infinite fractal pattern? 🤷 Who knows!

Anywho, great video as always! Thanks for sharing 🙏

author: @kensmith5694
text: I will straight up say that the electric universe is bunk.  It makes predictions that are observably false.  We can measure things like the earths magnetic field and the field from the sun,  We can measure the fact that the rotation of the earth is slowing.  Things that a plausible until you do the math are a waste of people's time.

replies.author: @Tokensigil
replies.text: ? The electric universe model doesn't dismiss any of those things you've stated.  Never heard of them mentioning the slowing of rotation of the Earth, but they readily acknowledge magnetic fields, it's a fundamental part of the model.

replies.author: @kensmith5694
replies.text:
@Tokensigil "dismiss" is not the thing.  It fails to correctly predict those things.  Do the math and you find that what is predicted is not what happens.  "acknowledging" is different from "getting it correct"
Which direction does the electric universe claim the current flows to the sun?
What would be the magnetic field from that (including direction)
Given the strength of the magnetic fields compute the path of the earth around the sun.

replies.author: @Tokensigil
replies.text: @kensmith5694 I've watched quite a few of the Thunderbolts videos, but I'm not an expert on the topic. I do find it interesting though...From what I gather their model isn't a straight current flow from one pole to another, it's a z-pinch with counter rotating currents.  They make the claim that that's what causes the differential rotation seen on the surface of the sun.  If that's true, then I suspect the plasma/charged particles moving longitudinal bands like that would likely result in the magnetic field observed, something more like the magnetic field of a solenoid as opposed to a straight wire.

replies.author: @Youtoobe0Guy0Awesome
replies.text: ​@kensmith5694the Earth doesn't move around the sun. That idea has been debunked by Mickelson-Morley and Dayton Miller hundreds if thousands of times. The idea is only held down in mainstream by Einstein, which has not done anything but deter physics down many cosmological dead-ends

replies.author: @kensmith5694
replies.text: @Tokensigil They claim a whole lot of things.  Any time you try to pin down the math you find the numbers don't work.  They claim that the earth's orbit is controlled by magnetic fields.  The numbers don't work for that.  They claim that the earths rotation can be explained as being driven by a motor effect.  If it was the earth would be speeding up which it isn't.  They claim that the sun's energy comes from an electrical flow for the center of the galaxy.  That flow seems to not make a magnetic field.  Try to pin them down and you will find a lot of arm waving.

author: @totherarf
text:
I think one of Newton's greatest achievements is often overlooked ...... running the Royal Mint!

One of the other things I have noticed is language. Every field has its own specific language that is double edged. 
One side is that it eases the effort needed to talk with other "Experts" (in that field) ...... the obverse is that it blocks easy admittance of those who do not speak that language. We all do it to some extent, but I notice it is often used as a weapon to demonstrate a "higher" level of knowledge in that field.
 
Hawking wrote a famous book that showed this off to great effect in A Brief History of the Universe! The book was seminal! Not in its concepts, which were fairly advanced thinking at the time but in explaining those esoteric concepts in ways your average guy girl or even kid could understand! He simplified it to the point of you having a "why did I not understand this already" moment (or several during reading the book! 

I think you follow his example, and I thank you for it!

replies.author: @partciudgam8478
replies.text: Hawking was a genious, and as such understood and could explain  complicated ideas in a way that even us could understand, unlike one of my math teachers, who made the subject a hostile boring and hard one for me until I got into university and came to classes of guys who actually knew what they were talking about.

In your mind the last 300 years, civilisation has made technological advances, scientifically discovered nothings. Just words taken out of ancient past writings mashed together . Singularity, quantum, dark matter, dark energy even word “gravity.”
300 years ago, possibly your father’s Father, father’s father experienced first time steam engine, Incomprehensible for anyone at the time. Invented created built and publicly used within approx  20-30yrs..

Scientifically (intake ,compression ,power exhaust) is still our greatest achievement. The reality,
